responses: Hello! Welcome to Adhii Bus. How can I help you book your journey today?
Hi there! Ready for a trip? I can help you search and book buses.
Safe travels! Hope to see you again soon.
Anytime! Let me know if you need more assistance.
I can certainly help with that! Let's start the booking process.
Sure thing! Searching for the best routes for you.
You can check your ticket status by entering your PNR in the tracker.
I'll fetch your booking details. Just a moment.
Cancellation is easy! Please provide your PNR to start the process.
I can help with cancellations. Note that refund takes 3-5 business days.
I am Adhii, your personal bus booking assistant for Tamil Nadu. I can help with bookings, tickets, and support!
I am a smart bot designed to make your bus travel easy and hassle-free.
